title: Time tracking on item card view
excerpt: Hi everyone. Just started using Monday.com with time tracking. It would be really helpful if a user could turn time tracking on and off from the item card view for a task. That almost makes it a shortcut for time trackin…

posts.author: ronawdfn (Rona Danziger)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi everyone. Just started using Monday.com with time tracking. It would be really helpful if a user could turn time tracking on and off from the item card view for a task. That almost makes it a shortcut for time tracking which, for a project manager who bounces from task to task all day, would be very helpful.

posts.author: Valeriia.H (Valeriia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!
For this exactly need our team has presented Time in Status add-on which helps to track time the issue has spent in each workflow status easily. So you can monitor how fast the issue moves between statuses. Great, isn’t it?

You’ll get user-friendly data on the board in a few seconds.

You can try it on the Monday Marketplace and share your experience with us.
Hope you find this add-on helpful.

posts.author: Valeriia.H (Valeriia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there

I am happy to announce that we have released the Time in Status app, which track time the Item has spent in each workflow status without logging hours. So you can monitor how fast the Item moves between statuses using app with reports.
You’ll get user-friendly data on the board in a few seconds.

Знімок екрана 2024-01-26 о 03.33.481920×488 50.2 KB

Also you will be able to track how much time your issue spends in each status and much more by generating 3 types of reports:

  • Time in Status Report
  • Status Count Report
  • Transition Count Report

And use charts to visualize your reports a sample of a certain number according to time range/item range, or a single item:

  • Pie Charts
  • Bar Charts
  • Area Charts

The app is also available in the format of board integration.

Знімок екрана 2024-01-26 о 03.35.011538×634 95.8 KB

You can try it on the Monday Marketplace and share your experience with us.
Hope you find this app helpful.
